name: Helpful
description: Boost all the stats of the allies by 2% except for their health.

name: Silent Steps
description: Boost damage by 10% against enemy in crisis.

name: Positivity
description: This character can't go in crisis. ally in crisis heal 5% of their max health every turn.

name: kind heart
description: Healing, shield and buff are 10% stronger. If the target is in crisis, effects are 15% stronger instead.

name: Iron Will
description: While in crisis, every turn boost random stat by 5%.

name: Sharp mind
description: boost magic defense by 15%.

name: Knight's honor
description: Boost defense by 15%.

name: Overgrowth
description: Boost health by 15%.

name: Beast knight
description: While in crisis, boost attack and magic attack by 10%.

name: Never give up
description: While in crisis, boost all stats by 5% except for Health.

name: Wind's favor
description: Boost speed by 15%.

name: Bug lord
description: Boost grass and wind attacks by 15%.

name: Omen of the forest
description: Reduce enemies speed by 5%.

name: Tenacity
description: While in crisis, boost defense and magic defense by 10%.

name: Fire!!
description: Boost fire attack by 20%.

name: Rank SSS
description: Boost the 3 lower stats by 5%, while in crisis by 15%.

name: Basic of magic
description: Boost fire, grass and water attack by 10%. Reduce fire, grass, water damage by 10%.

name: lost forest's breath
description: Boost attack by 7%, While in crisis instead Boost defence by 7% and heal 5% of their max health every turn.

name: Dark aura
description: Boost dark attack by 20%.

name: Divine blessing
description: Heals every turn for 5% of max health.

name: relentless assault
description: Boost damage by 25% if the target resists the attack type.

name: Punch thrower
description: Boost Punch attack by 20%.
